---
description: "Start a working session — orient on current tasks and reminders"
---

Read these files in order:
1. `ops/tasks.md`
2. `ops/reminders.md`
3. `ops/open-questions.md`

Then:
- Summarise what's active and what's due or overdue
- Note items blocked or waiting on others
- Ask the user what they want to work on this session

Keep the summary brief (5–10 lines).
